channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Suspected asbestos, 7th April
item.description:
Suspected asbestos which is a health hazard give it has been cracked and disturbed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stembridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 7th April
item.description:
Furniture and other household items dumped opposite 191 Ravensbourne Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continued dumping of waste, 7th April
item.description:
Ongoing, daily dumping of waste and recycling by the wheelie bin left by the council on Rowhill Rd. I believe this is to serve Clarence Mansions, but is never used correctly and is a constant problem.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large plasma tv dumped east pavement, 7th April
item.description:
Large tv dumped east pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Airer and other household rubbish on pavement, 7th April
item.description:
Airer and other rubbish on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Bin full, 7th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Lots rubbish around bin, 7th April
item.description:
Rubbish around bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Plastic drawer unit left on paved area, 7th April
item.description:
As per image

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London

item.title: Lots rubbish dumped around bin, 7th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped around bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin and bags of rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
The bin has been reported several times - when it was first put there a few weeks ago it had a sign saying not wanted - the pavement is narrow and local disabled residents are having problems passing with mobility scooters/wheelchairs etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting litter from nightclub goers, 7th April
item.description:
Millenium Way and Boots Street look like something out of a third world slum. Shame on Greenwich council for tolerating this behaviour and allowing this nightclub to operate like this. Close it down! Or at least add more bins to the area.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millennium Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Bin Bags, 7th April
item.description:
A number of black bin bags on the pavement. All split open (foxes) with litter gradually spreading.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 243, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Birds poo, 7th April
item.description:
There’s birds poo on the top landing of Clare house. The balcony needs sweeping and mopping as do the stairs and the block. The landing is never swept or mopped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brodie Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 7th April
item.description:
The tenant at number 6 Clare House his dog is being allowed to poo inside the pitch and it’s not being picked up. The teams, his son and a friend of the tenant all allow the same Doberman dog to foul inside the pitch and on the grass area outside Clare House
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brodie Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household furniture, 7th April
item.description:
A sofa right by the communal bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lockhurst Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking and obstruction, 7th April
item.description:
Illegal parking and obstruction

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Maidstone Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 273 Kilburn Lane, 6th April
item.description:
Pavement has a large deep hole, unclear whether it’s abandoned Utility work or what. No signage, barriers all over the ground, blocking Road and pavement but not preventing anyone falling in the hole as they have mostly collapsed. Hole has been there more than a week with no action at all.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole opposite golf club entrance, 6th April
item.description:
There is a large pothole in the outside lane of the northbound carriageway of the A12 near to the turning for Maylands golf club. It is large enough to cause a serious danger to any two wheeled vehicles with the potential that if theu hit it they could come off and cause serious injury to themselves.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colchester Road, Harold Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large 2 foot +pothole, 6th April
item.description:
The pothole is very large in the middle of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crewys Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Keeps going to red, 6th April
item.description:
Keeps going to red when there is none there.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shooters Hill, Shooters Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
